>更新时间：2026.06.25

# 微信支付 - 下载账单（普通商户）文档索引

> 下载账单提供交易、资金、退款、分账等多维度对账文件，支持按时间筛选获取明细，用于财务核对、结算审计与数据归档，帮助商户清晰管理资金流水，提升账务处理效率与透明度。

## 接入指引
- [业务示例代码](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/merchant/4015945131.md)
- [产品介绍](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/merchant/4013071215.md)
- [常见问题](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/merchant/4013071254.md)
- [开发指引](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/merchant/4013071218.md)
- [错误码](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/merchant/4020801299.md)

## API 列表
- [申请交易账单](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/merchant/4013071227.md)
- [申请资金账单](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/merchant/4013071235.md)
- [下载账单](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/merchant/4013071238.md)

## 请求示例
- [申请交易账单 - curl 示例](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/merchant/4013071227-curl.md)
- [申请交易账单 - Java 示例](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/merchant/4013071227-java.md)
- [申请交易账单 - Go 示例](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/merchant/4013071227-go.md)
- [申请资金账单 - curl 示例](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/merchant/4013071235-curl.md)
- [申请资金账单 - Java 示例](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/merchant/4013071235-java.md)
- [申请资金账单 - Go 示例](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/merchant/4013071235-go.md)

## 附录
- [交易账单详细说明](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/merchant/4013071246.md)
- [资金账单详细说明](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/merchant/4013071249.md)
- [下载账单操作指引](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/merchant/4013071252.md)
